name: Trading Dashboard
description: Real-time trading analytics with live chart updates, equity curves, and multi-strategy performance tracking.

name: Cyberpunk Portfolio
description: This very portfolio — a fully static cyberpunk-aesthetic site built with HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JS. No build step.

name: Dev Toolkit CLI
description: A command-line utility for scaffolding projects, managing environments, and automating repetitive dev tasks.

name: Market Screener
description: Automated stock screener that filters equities by technical criteria and sends daily digest emails.

name: Component Library
description: A reusable glassmorphism UI component library with dark/light theming, built in pure CSS and vanilla JS.

name: Log Analyzer
description: CLI tool that parses server logs, detects anomalies, and generates visual HTML reports with trend charts.
